    www/py-django-haystack: Maintainer reset

    There have been multiple consecutive maintainer timeouts of this port
    maintained by Kristaps Kulis <kristaps.kulis@gmail.com>.  We thank
    Kristaps for all his efforts and hope to welcome him back in the future.
